dialogos.texto_en: Is this really okay?\nThings don't seem to be going well.
Uesugi-kun's reactions are also pretty iffy, huh.
It's difficult to act...like a girlfriend...\nI don't know what the right answer is...
I need to gather more information while we're here.\nAnyway, the only thing to do is to study!
Umm...
(It's troublesome that different books and websites\n say different things.)
(On this site, they say it's good,\n but on the next site, they say it's bad.)
(Is there even a correct answer, in the first place?)
(No, the trip has already started.\n There's no choice but to do it!)
(What should we do at night...?)
('Spending the night with your lover at a tourist spot.'\n This website seems helpful.)
(...Whaaaa?! That's too bold...)
(Th-this is really too much... Oh, but maybe\n it's more natural to do something like this?)
(In any case, I've got to be more daring here%p-2;――%p;)
HYAA?!
Y-yes!\nI'll be out in a moment!
I'm baaack!
Ah, Ichika.
Welcome back.\nHow was the lounge?
The night view was even more beautiful than here.\nYou should have come too, Itsuki-chan.
But, wait.\nWhat about Yotsuba and Raiha-chan?\nThey should have gone after you, Itsuki-chan.
Ah, they've already returned to their room together.
Did you talk about anything?
No, not really.
I see...
Um, Ichika.\nI'm going out for a bit.
Huh? Aren't you tired?
I rested a little, so I'm fine.\nActually, I'm pretty energetic.
That's fine%p-2;――
Okay then, I'll be off!
*sigh*
(Even though she's worried about me...\n I'm sorry. But I still have something I have to do.)
